description: M4 audit finding F3 (issue #405): the parenthesized `(point 3 4 5)` over-supplies the 2-field `point`'s constructor, raising `ol-too-many-inputs` statically under `check()` — the static counterpart to the existing runtime fixture `data/struct-runtime/struct-constructor-too-many`.

diagnostics.message: point takes two inputs, but got 3.
